name: Spinach Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach according to microwave directions; drain well.
2. Add spinach to softened cream cheese.
3. Add chopped green onions, diced tomatoes, and chopped green chilies.
4. Stir in half of the shredded cheddar cheese until combined.
5. Mix well and top with remaining cheese.
6. Microwave for about 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.
7. Serve with tortilla chips.
